title: Full Stack Developer (VueJs, Nuxt.js & C#)
description: Pozisyon Hakkında Yüksek trafikli sistemlerimizde uçtan uca mimari sorumluluk alacak, kod kalitesini standartların üzerine taşıyacak ve ölçeklenebilir mikroservis ekosistemimize liderlik edecek bir Full stack Developer arıyoruz. Ne Yapacaksınız Event-driven mimariye uygun, yüksek performanslı Node.js servisleri tasarlamak ve implemente etmek Vue.js 3 ve TypeScript kullanarak, reusable komponent kütüphaneleri ve performans odaklı ön yüzler geliştirmek Firebase ve PostgreSQL veritabanı katmanlarında query optimizasyonu ve veri modellemesi yapmak Aradığımız Profil Node.js runtime ve asenkron programlama konusunda derinlemesine uzmanlık Modern frontend ekosistemine (State management, Composition API, SSR) hakimiyet Docker, Kubernetes ve CI/CD süreçlerinde aktif tecrübe Vue.js ve Nuxt.js konusunda uzmanlık .Net teknolojisi C# ta yazılım geliştirmiş MS SQL ile çalışmış Tercih Sebebi Microservices mimarisi ve Docker/Kubernetes konteynerizasyon süreçlerinde deneyim Birim test (Unit Test) ve entegrasyon testleri (Jest, Cypress) yazma disiplinine sahip olmak Teknik literatürü takip edebilecek seviyede İngilizce bilgisi Açık kaynak projelere katkı sağlamış olmak veya aktif bir GitHub portfolyosu Agile ve Scrum metodolojilerine aşinalık Clean Code konseptlerinin uygulanması ve kaynak kod iyileştirme/refactoring konusunda uzmanlık Bootstrap, HTML ve CSS deneyimi

title: .NET Backend Developer - Turkish Speaking
description: Based in City of London, Guardian is a rapidly growing, progressive business that offers its employees career development in a fast-paced, collegial working environment. We offer Recruitment services designed to meet our clients’ individual business needs - from planning stages and all the way through to onboarding and induction. Whilst striving to deliver excellence in our working practice, we support clients in the end to end recruitment process. We are seeking a skilled .NET Backend Developer to join our engineering team. You will be involved in building scalable, high-performance backend services using modern technologies such as .NET Core, PostgreSQL, Redis, Elasticsearch, and a microservices architecture. Experience with Card Systems, POS, E-money, or Banking/Financial systems is required. Key Responsibilities Develop, maintain, and optimize backend services using C# and .NET (Core) Build and maintain RESTful APIs and microservices Collaborate with frontend developers, QA, and product teams Write clean, maintainable, and testable code following best practices Integrate with relational (SQL Server, PostgreSQL) or NoSQL databases Implement and improve CI/CD pipelines Monitor, troubleshoot, and improve system performance and reliability Participate in code reviews and contribute to architecture discussions Required Qualifications Minimum 5+ years of professional experience in .NET development Strong proficiency with C# and .NET (Core) Experience building scalable APIs and backend systems Knowledge of Entity Framework / EF Core Solid understanding of SQL and database design Experience with version control (Git) Familiarity with cloud platforms (Azure/AWS) Understanding of OOP, Design Patterns, and best practices Good problem-solving skills and attention to detail
